menu-description-description: [ I design solutions that solve problems, improve conversions, and look great. I work at the intersection of web design, product, and front-end, taking metrics, MVPs, and development constraints into account. I turn business goals into clear interfaces. I know HTML/CSS, build prototypes and landing pages fast. I use video editing for presentations, promo videos, and UI animations. ]
menu-about-experience-text: years working on commercial projects: from interface design in Figma to building UI kits and interactive prototypes. I did layouts in CSS, frameworks, and website builders. I know the guidelines and adapt designs for different platforms; I also created promo materials and videos.
menu-about-projects-text: projects were delivered — from landing pages to complex web platforms. I developed several design systems, cutting build and revision time by up to 40%. I worked with products in VR, e-learning, and marketing, improving UX and visual consistency.
menu-about-hobbies-text: In my free time, I keep growing as a designer, take on freelance work, and explore new directions. I follow my favorite designers and get inspired by their work. Sometimes I go out to cool places, or just relax at home — movies, a bit of gaming, and the gym for balance.
menu-projects-description: [ Real commercial cases, taken all the way to launch. Here are the things that were not just imagined, but shipped and working in real life. ]
menu-designs-description: [ Concepts and prototypes without implementation: study work, freelance projects, and personal experiments. Here, the focus is on the idea, structure, and presentation, not the code. ]
menu-creatives-description: [ A selection of visuals I generate, assemble, and refine. It includes both commissioned work and personal experiments — everything where I could play with the idea, mood, and style. ]
menu-footer-description: [ If a project feels vague, but you sense there’s something there. I’ll help find the core and shape it into something solid. ]
projects-varwinDotCom-description: A full refresh of varwin.com — redesign, UX optimization, and new sections.
projects-varwinDotCom-text-1: Redesign of the Varwin XRMS download page to refresh the interface and improve conversion. I ran short interviews with marketing and users, сформулированы UX hypotheses and designed a prototype. After testing and revisions, the final version was implemented in Bootstrap 4.
projects-varwinDotCom-text-2: Design of the user project registry in the Varwin Education section. The section brought the community together and made it possible to share your work and explore projects by other users.
projects-xrms-description: UI kit and prototypes for Varwin XRMS to visualize ideas and test changes
projects-xrms-text: The main layout with components and prototypes, bringing together all interface elements needed to visualize and test new features in the Varwin XRMS platform. The layout serves as a foundation for discussion, testing, and implementing product changes.
projects-xrms-result: Developers started building the interface faster thanks to ready-made components and clear prototypes. The layout reduced revisions and ensured visual consistency.
projects-xrms-stats-1: Faster mockup design through ready-made components
design-varwinMobile-text: Varwin mobile app interface — for launching projects from a smartphone or headset.
design-subscout-text: A mobile app for adding and tracking a user's subscriptions to paid services.
design-baikal-text: Landing page refresh for the travel club “Time for a Trip,” which offers tours to Lake Baikal.
design-pioner-text: Landing page refresh for a heavy machinery plant.
design-admaster-text: Responsive landing page design for AdMaster — an internet advertising management platform for media publishers.
design-0xprocessing-text: Landing page development for 0x Processing — a crypto payments service for digital goods marketplaces.
design-stuff-text: Landing page development for Staff — a staffing and recruitment agency.
design-robogrid-text: Dashboard development for RoboGrid — a system for analyzing failures, department load, and robot performance.
design-analyticalPlatform-text: Interface for analyzing A/B test results with convenient filtering and metric comparison.
design-mooozik-text: Mooozik is a Dutch music startup that produces unique music tracks made exclusively for cows.
hw-disabled: Hardware acceleration is off, visual effects are disabled
